ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT a.attachment_id AS "添付ID",
    count(c.attachment_comment_id) AS "コメント数",
    max_comment.attachment_comment AS "最終コメント",
    max_comment.last_updated_label AS "最終更新ラベル"
   FROM ((t_object_attachment a
     LEFT JOIN t_object_attachment_comment c ON ((a.attachment_id = c.attachment_id)))
     LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t1.attachment_id,
            t1.attachment_comment,
            t1.last_updated_label
           FROM t_object_attachment_comment t1
          WHERE (t1.attachment_comment_id = ( SELECT max(t2.attachment_comment_id) AS max
                   FROM t_object_attachment_comment t2
                  WHERE (t2.attachment_id = t1.attachment_id)))) max_comment ON ((a.attachment_id = max_comment.attachment_id)))
  GROUP BY a.attachment_id, max_comment.attachment_comment, max_comment.last_updated_label
  ORDER BY a.attachment_id;
